qualification.details: Before registering on the National Apprenticeship Portal, candidates must carefully verify that they meet both the educational qualification and age conditions set by MSЕТCL. Applications that do not meet these criteria will be rejected without prior notice. | The MSЕТCL Apprentice 2026 recruitment requires candidates to hold two specific qualifications simultaneously. Both must be fulfilled; neither alone is sufficient for eligibility. | Passed Maharashtra State Secondary School Certificate (SSC) Examination - i.e., Class 10 / Matriculation from a Maharashtra State board Passed the ITI (Industrial Training Institute) Electrician trade examination - all four semesters - from an institution affiliated with the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT), New Delhi | Note: Only NCVT-affiliated ITI certificates are accepted. salary_details.details: Selected apprentices will be paid a stipend as per the prevailing norms applicable under the Apprentices Act. The notification states that the stipend will be governed by current government rules (Prachalit Niyamapramane). The exact monthly stipend amount will be communicated at the time of engagement / training commencement.

how_to_apply: The application process for MSЕТCL EHV Panvel Apprentice 2026 is entirely online and must be completed through the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal. There is no provision for offline or postal applications. Follow these steps carefully to successfully submit your application.
Visit the official apprenticeship portal: www.apprenticeshipindia.org
Register or log in using your credentials on the portal
Search for the establishment: M.S.E.T.C.L. EHV O&M Circle, Panvel using the establishment registration number E09162700835
Apply against the notified vacancy before 10 July 2026 (24:00 hrs)
Upload all required documents in the correct format on your profile before submitting
Ensure your name on the SSC marksheet and Aadhaar Card match exactly - mismatches will result in rejection
Provide a working email ID and mobile number - eligible candidates will be contacted only through the registered mobile number and email
Take a printout or screenshot of the submitted application for your records

Note: Incomplete online applications will not be accepted. Applications submitted outside the notified date window (22 June - 10 July 2026) will not be considered under any circumstances, and no complaint regarding this will be entertained. Candidates who have previously applied under other establishment registration numbers on this portal and wish to apply here must re-submit a fresh application for this specific vacancy.

content_sections.heading: MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Notification Out
content_sections.text: MSЕТCL's EHV O&M Circle, Panvel has officially released the Apprentice Recruitment 2026 public notice (Ref. No. 01382) on 19 June 2026. The notice is issued by the Superintending Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Mandal, Panvel, and invites ITI-qualified candidates to register on the National Apprenticeship Portal. This notice is valid exclusively for the 2026-27 training year and only applications received through the official apprenticeshipindia.org portal during the notified window will be considered. PDF Download Link The official MSЕТCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification (Jaahir Suchna) has been issued from the office of the Superintending Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Mandal, Panvel, Raigad - 410206. Candidates are advised to download and read the official notice in full before applying. Official Notification PDF: Click Here Apprenticeship Portal: www.apprenticeshipindia.org Official Email for Queries: [email protected] / [email protected]

content_sections.heading: MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: Daily Current Affairs 22 June 2026: Download Free PDF Now

rows.details: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Ltd. (MAHATRANSCO)
Superintending Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Mandal, Panvel

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details - MAHATRANSCO EHV O&M Circle Panvel Apprentice 2026
content_sections.text: MAHATRANSCO has notified a single category of apprenticeship post - Electrician (Vijantri) - under the Auda Sanvasu Mandal, Panvel Division. All 77 seats are for the 2026-27 training batch and the engagement is for one year on a contractual basis as per the Apprentices Act. Note: The authority reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies. Any such decision will not be communicated to individual candidates.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates - MAHATRANSCO Apprentice 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must strictly adhere to the dates given below. Applications submitted before or after the specified window will not be considered. There is no provision for late submission or offline applications.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria - MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Before registering on the National Apprenticeship Portal, candidates must carefully verify that they meet both the educational qualification and age conditions set by MSЕТCL. Applications that do not meet these criteria will be rejected without prior notice. The MSЕТCL Apprentice 2026 recruitment requires candidates to hold two specific qualifications simultaneously. Both must be fulfilled; neither alone is sufficient for eligibility. Passed Maharashtra State Secondary School Certificate (SSC) Examination - i.e., Class 10 / Matriculation from a Maharashtra State board Passed the ITI (Industrial Training Institute) Electrician trade examination - all four semesters - from an institution affiliated with the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT), New Delhi Note: Only NCVT-affiliated ITI certificates are accepted. State-board ITI or non-affiliated courses do not qualify. As per the official notification, the age eligibility window for MSЕТCL Apprentice 2026 is clearly defined. Candidates outside this range will not be considered regardless of their qualifications. Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for candidates from reserved / backward class categories (as per prevailing Maharashtra government rules) Age is calculated as on the last date of application, i.e., 10 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Stipend
content_sections.text: Selected apprentices will be paid a stipend as per the prevailing norms applicable under the Apprentices Act. The notification states that the stipend will be governed by current government rules (Prachalit Niyamapramane). The exact monthly stipend amount will be communicated at the time of engagement / training commencement.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply - MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The application process for MSЕТCL EHV Panvel Apprentice 2026 is entirely online and must be completed through the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal. There is no provision for offline or postal applications. Follow these steps carefully to successfully submit your application. Visit the official apprenticeship portal: www.apprenticeshipindia.org Register or log in using your credentials on the portal Search for the establishment: M.S.E.T.C.L. EHV O&M Circle, Panvel using the establishment registration number E09162700835 Apply against the notified vacancy before 10 July 2026 (24:00 hrs) Upload all required documents in the correct format on your profile before submitting Ensure your name on the SSC marksheet and Aadhaar Card match exactly - mismatches will result in rejection Provide a working email ID and mobile number - eligible candidates will be contacted only through the registered mobile number and email Take a printout or screenshot of the submitted application for your records Note: Incomplete online applications will not be accepted. Applications submitted outside the notified date window (22 June - 10 July 2026) will not be considered under any circumstances, and no complaint regarding this will be entertained. Candidates who have previously applied under other establishment registration numbers on this portal and wish to apply here must re-submit a fresh application for this specific vacancy.

content_sections.heading: MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
content_sections.text: The online application window for MSЕТCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is open from 22 June 2026 to 10 July 2026 . Only applications submitted through the link below will be accepted. No offline mode is available. Apply Online: https://www.apprenticeshipindia.org Establishment Registration No.: E09162700835 Email for Queries: [email protected] | [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Documents to Upload While Applying
content_sections.text: All the documents listed below must be scanned and uploaded on your apprenticeshipindia.org profile before or at the time of applying. Documents uploaded after submission cannot be changed. Failure to upload any mandatory document will result in the application being treated as incomplete. SSC (Class 10) Marksheet - Original copy, scanned clearly ITI (Electrician Trade) Marksheet - All four semesters' NCVT-passed marksheets (original copy) Aadhaar Card - Name must match SSC and ITI marksheets exactly Caste Certificate - For backward class / reserved category candidates (as per Maharashtra government norms) Maharashtra Domicile Certificate - Proof of Maharashtra state residency Non-Creamy Layer / Upper Caste Certificate (if applicable) and any other relevant annexures as required Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Terms and Conditions - Key Points
content_sections.text: Candidates must carefully read all the terms and conditions of the MSЕТCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 before applying. Violation of any condition may lead to disqualification from the current selection process or future recruitments. MSЕТCL reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies or cancel the recruitment process at any stage without prior notice to candidates Any candidate found to have applied using political or other unauthorized influence during the recruitment process will be immediately disqualified Apprentice selection will be done strictly on the basis of SSC and ITI marks, subject to social reservation norms as per Maharashtra government rules Uploading of all original documents on the portal in the correct format is mandatory; applications without proper uploads will be rejected The name on SSC and ITI marksheets must match the name on the Aadhaar Card; any mismatch will lead to rejection Candidates must register their current official email ID and mobile number at the time of application - these will be the only means of communication Incomplete or applications submitted with incorrect documents will not be considered. If false information is found at any stage, the candidature will be cancelled immediately Candidates claiming reservation benefits must produce the relevant reservation certificates whenever required by the office under applicable government circular rules Applications received before 22 June 2026 or after 10 July 2026 will not be considered, and no queries or complaints regarding this will be entertained Only complete and eligible applications will be processed; shortlisted candidates will be contacted through their registered mobile number and email ID

content_sections.heading: About MAHATRANSCO - Mahapareshan
content_sections.text: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MAHATRANSCO), also known as Mahapareshan , is a Maharashtra government undertaking responsible for the high-voltage electricity transmission network across the state. Incorporated in 2005 (CIN: U40109MH2005SGC153646), its registered office is at Prakashganga, Plot No. C-19 "E" Block, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai - 400 051. The EHV O&M Circle, Panvel, is one of its operational divisions managing extra-high-voltage transmission infrastructure in the Raigad district area. Apprenticeship at MSЕТCL gives candidates direct exposure to EHV substation operations, switchyard maintenance, and electrical transmission systems - invaluable experience for career growth in the power sector.

faq.question: Q1. Has MAHATRANSCO officially released the Apprentice Recruitment Notification 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MAHATRANSCO) has officially released the Apprentice Recruitment 2026 public notice vide Reference No. 01382, dated 19 June 2026, through the office of the Superintending Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Mandal, Panvel. The notice announces 77 Electrician (Vijantri) apprentice seats under the EHV O&M Circle, Panvel, for the training year 2026–27.

faq.question: Q2. How many apprentice vacancies has MAHATRANSCO announced for 2026?
faq.answer: MAHATRANSCO has announced 77 apprentice vacancies for the Electrician (Vijantri) trade under the EHV O&M Circle, Panvel, for 2026–27. The establishment registration number is E09162700835.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for MAHATRANSCO EHV Panvel Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026 by 24:00 hours. Applications will not be accepted after this deadline under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q4. Where do I apply for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online at www.apprenticeshipindia.org - the official National Apprenticeship Training portal. There is no offline application mode available. Search for the establishment using registration number E09162700835.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed both: (1) the Maharashtra SSC (Class 10) examination, and (2) the ITI Electrician trade (all four semesters) from an NCVT-affiliated institution. Both qualifications are mandatory - holding only one does not make a candidate eligible.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice 2026 is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 38 years. Candidates from backward/reserved categories are eligible for an age relaxation of 5 years, making their upper age limit 43 years, as per Maharashtra government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the stipend for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The stipend for selected apprentices will be paid as per prevailing government rules applicable under the Apprentices Act. The notification does not specify a fixed monthly amount; the exact stipend will be communicated at the time of training commencement.

faq.question: Q8. For how long is the MAHATRANSCO apprenticeship engagement?
faq.answer: The apprenticeship is a one-year contract-based engagement for the training year 2026–27. It is not a permanent job. The engagement is governed by the provisions of the Apprentices Act and MAHATRANSCO internal terms and conditions.

faq.question: Q9. Is a domicile certificate mandatory for MAHATRANSCO Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. A Maharashtra State Domicile Certificate is one of the mandatory documents that must be uploaded on the apprenticeshipindia.org portal at the time of application. Applications without this certificate will be treated as incomplete.

faq.question: Q10. Will candidates be informed individually about the vacancy count changes?
faq.answer: No. MAHATRANSCO reserves the right to increase or reduce the number of apprentice vacancies or even cancel the recruitment at any stage. Any such decision will not be communicated to individual candidates, and no complaints in this regard will be entertained.
